name: Celldom Classic
short_description: The popular webgame comes to Steam! Celldom is a different type of clicker game where you swipe over a "board" to earn income instead of clicking. Spend money on upgrading your board, upgrade idle earnings, unlock dashers and rebirth to start over again with permanent boosts.
detailed_description:
​Swipe. Upgrade. Expand.​

Celldom is the original web hit, now on Steam.​

Swipe across a grid of cells to generate income, upgrade individual cells, and expand your board. Unlock dashers for passive income and rebirth to boost your earnings further.

This version includes Steam achievements, leaderboards, and cloud saves.​

Whether you're revisiting or just discovering it, Celldom offers a straightforward, engaging idle experience.​

Key Features:​

  • Simple swipe-based incremental gameplay​

  • Expand your board and upgrade the cells for more value​

  • Dashers for passive income

  • Rebirth system for progression​

  • Steam achievements and leaderboards​

  • Fully playable on Steam Deck
